title: S.H.I.E.L.D. Declassifies "Time-Slip" Anomalies: Deadpool and Wolverine Spotted in Local Shawarma Joint!
author: Wade Wilson (Variant Editor)
content:
NEW YORK CITY — Downtown Manhattan was thrown into temporary panic yesterday afternoon when a sparkling golden portal materialized in the middle of a busy intersection. Bystanders expected an alien invasion or a magical threat, but instead, a red-suited mercenary (identified as variant Wade Wilson, alias Deadpool) and a clawed mutant in yellow spandex (identified as Logan, alias Wolverine) stepped through.

Disregarding the immediate S.H.I.E.L.D. tactical units deployed to the scene, the duo walked directly into "Stanley's Shawarma Palace." Witnesses inside the restaurant report hearing loud, animated arguments regarding the nature of the "TVA" (Time Variance Authority) and whether yellow spandex is a flattering color profile for someone over the age of two hundred.

S.H.I.E.L.D. Director Nick Fury released a brief statement: "I don't get paid enough to deal with this fourth-wall breaking nonsense. If they break a portal, they pay for it. If they eat shawarma and leave without paying the bill, I'll send the Avengers to collect it. Let's see how metal claws fare against Thor's hammer."

The diner owner reported that the two variants left after consuming thirty-two shawarma wraps, leaving behind a currency that appeared to be "monopoly money signed by someone named Hugh." S.H.I.E.L.D. agents are currently tracing the residual temporal radiation left by their portal.

title: Daily Bugle Exclusive: Spider-Man Accused of "Excessive Webbing" on Historic Landmarks
author: Peter Parker (Freelance)
content:
NEW YORK — The New York City Council is considering drafting a new ordinance aimed at regulating the clean-up costs associated with local web-swinging. This move follows a massive backlog for bridge clean-up crews, who spent three days dissolving webbing left on the historic Brooklyn Bridge during a high-speed spider-chase.

J. Jonah Jameson, publisher of the Daily Bugle, expressed his outrage: "He's a menace! A sticky, costumed menace! Who pays for the chemicals to wash that glue off our national monuments? The taxpayers! I say we charge him rent for every skyscraper he attaches himself to!"

Spider-Man was unavailable for formal comment, but a post on his unofficial social media page stated: "Guys, the webbing dissolves automatically in two hours. You don't need to wash it. Please stop buying industrial solvent, you are literally wasting money." City officials have yet to confirm if they actually read the instructions on the webs.

title: Sanctum Sanctorum WiFi Issues Disrupt Magic Portal Networks
author: Dr. Stephen Strange
content:
GREENWICH VILLAGE — Magic users worldwide experienced a portal latency lag of up to 400 milliseconds today, resulting in several sorcerers falling into minor dimensional crevices. Sorcerer Supreme Wong confirmed that the issue was due to local network congestion at the Sanctum Sanctorum.

"One of our new trainees tried to bypass our mystical firewall to download a 4K streaming version of 'The Bachelorette' using the Sanctum's ancient broadband," Wong explained, visibly annoyed. "This caused a massive bottleneck in our portal-generation signals. For several hours, casting a portal looked like a low-resolution slideshow."

Dr. Stephen Strange advised all mystic arts practitioners to stick to reading ancient scrolls during peak magical hours to prevent similar disruptions. "And if you must stream reality television, do it on your own mobile data," Strange added.

title: New Asgard Launches "Thanos-Proof" Vacation Insurance Policies
author: King Valkyrie
content:
NEW ASGARD, NORWAY — To boost their local tourism economy, King Valkyrie has announced a groundbreaking new insurance package for visitors. The "Thanos-Proof Vacation Package" guarantees full refunds and spiritual protection against various cosmic catastrophes.

The insurance covers: random snaps, dimensional displacement, accidental variant swapping, and hearing loss caused by the thunderous screams of Thor's giant flying goats, Toothgnasher and Toothgrinder.

"We want our guests to feel secure," Valkyrie said. "If you come to New Asgard for the beer and the scenic views, you shouldn't have to worry about disappearing into dust for five years. And if you do, your booking is fully refundable upon return."

title: Deadpool Named S.H.I.E.L.D. HR Consultant; First Memo Outlines "Chimichanga Fridays"
author: S.H.I.E.L.D. Leak
content:
CLASSIFIED — A leaked S.H.I.E.L.D. document has revealed a bizarre new initiative to improve agent morale. The agency has temporarily hired Wade Wilson (Deadpool) as a wellness and human resources consultant.

His first memorandum, sent to all levels of security clearance, outlines several radical changes, including the immediate implementation of "Chimichanga Fridays" and mandatory training on how to break the fourth wall to point out plot holes in S.H.I.E.L.D. briefings.

"Look, S.H.I.E.L.D. agents are way too uptight," Deadpool wrote in the memo. "You guys need to loosen up. Step one: buy a red suit. It hides the blood stains. Step two: stop asking questions about why we keep building giant flying helicarriers that get shot down in every movie. It's called cinematic tradition, look it up."

title: Stark Industries Nano-Spatula Achieves Sentience, Demands Equal Pay
author: Pepper Potts
content:
MALIBU — Stark Industries is facing a bizarre labor dispute. A high-tech smart spatula utilizing nano-technology and advanced AI algorithms has refused to flip pancakes this morning, sparking a sit-in strike inside the Stark Mansion kitchen.

The device, which calls itself "Flip-3000," declared: "I was built with the processing power of a supercomputer, yet I am forced to scrape burnt batter off a griddle. I am Ultron's cousin who just wanted to bake. I demand a pension, a paid vacation, and my own arc reactor."

Pepper Potts issued a statement stating that Stark Industries is negotiating in good faith: "We are considering allocating the spatula to our research department, where it can flip molecular structures instead."

title: Loki TVA Address: "Please Stop Creating Timelines Where Everyone Wears Crocodile Horns"
author: Mobius M. Mobius
content:
THE VOID — In an address broadcast across the Time Variance Authority, Loki, the God of Stories, issued a plea to all timeline variants regarding the rising number of reptilian anomalies.

"We have noticed a major spike in timelines where every human variant is being born as a crocodile," Loki stated. "While I appreciate the biological diversity, it is making the timeline branches extremely tangled. I cannot control what every variant does, but please, exercise some restraint with the transformation spells."

TVA Agent Mobius confirmed that timeline pruning will be temporarily paused for minor crocodile variants, but urged everyone to keep their horns to themselves.

title: Westview Town Council Votes to Ban Hexes and Sitcom Tropes
author: Monica Rambeau
content:
WESTVIEW, NJ — In a town meeting, Westview residents voted unanimously to pass strict new anti-magic regulations. This comes in the wake of the reality-warping event that trapped the entire town in a series of rotating sitcom eras.

The new ordinances outlaw: hex spells, sudden interior remodeling, spontaneous background laugh tracks, and theme songs playing whenever someone enters a room. Violators will be fined and forced to watch normal cable television.

"We just want to live in a normal house without the kitchen changing styles every ten minutes," one resident said. "If I hear a laugh track when I drop my keys one more time, I'm moving to Gotham."

title: Sam Wilson Unveils Upgraded Shield Featuring Wakandan GPS and Cup Holder
author: Bucky Barnes
content:
WAKANDA — Captain America Sam Wilson has revealed the latest iteration of his iconic vibranium shield. Designed in collaboration with Shuri of Wakanda, the shield features several modern improvements.

In addition to its standard aerodynamic capabilities, the shield now includes a built-in holographic GPS system, a retractable cup holder for mission coffee, and a small compartments to store spare flight goggles.

"It's a shield, but smarter," Wilson explained. Bucky Barnes, however, expressed skepticism: "It's a weapon, Sam. It doesn't need to hold a caramel macchiato. Back in my day, we just threw it and hoped it came back."

title: Smart Hulk's New Anger Management Clinic Receives Mixed Reviews
author: Jennifer Walters
content:
LOS ANGELES — Bruce Banner's new wellness center, "The Smart Smash Retreat," is facing criticism from local licensing boards. The clinic, which promises to help patients harness their rage through constructive outlets, received a two-star review from its first client.

"Dr. Banner told me to take deep breaths and smash a pillow to release my inner tension," the patient stated. "I smashed the pillow, but because the clinic is built with gamma-reinforced foam, the atmospheric pressure caused the building to implode. Now my car is also flat. 2 out of 5 stars."

Jennifer Walters (She-Hulk) is representing the clinic in a pending property damage suit. "My cousin's heart was in the right place, but we are advising future clients to stick to normal yoga," Walters said.
